text.title: Cost Estimation Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. Every leaf is a `conclusion` element referencing a rule id; this ensures the tree stays in lock-step with the rule set.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the WBS decomposed to packages ≤80h with rates + risks available?

conclusion.verdict: Decompose WBS / assemble rates / risk register first

branch.when: inputs_ready == true AND pert_done == true AND loading_applied == false
inputs_ready == true AND pert_done == true AND loading_applied == true

example.trace: inputs_ready=true → pert_done=true → loading_applied=true → contingency computed → budget defendable.
